tips.text: Use /model to switch model providers and model names quickly.
Type /chat new to start a fresh thread while keeping workspace context.
Use /chat switch <name|id|index> to jump between task threads.
Run /chat list to view all chats in the current workspace.
Use /workspace list to see every registered workspace.
Run /workspace switch <name|id|path> before starting work on another project.
Use /workspace create <path> --name <name> to register a new project space.
Type /memory status to check whether memory is enabled and ready.
Use /memory remember <text> to save stable preferences for later sessions.
Run /memory search <query> when you want to recall prior decisions.
Use /execution-policy show to inspect current execution confirmation mode.
Prefix local shell commands with !, for example !git status.
Use /clear context to reset AI context but keep command history.
Use /clear input history to clear terminal input history.
Use /mcp status to inspect MCP server health and loading state.
Press Shift+Enter to insert a newline, and press Enter to send.
Use /help to view built-in commands whenever you are unsure.
